owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

params.qnrgSeedHash: Hash of QNRG seed used for keygen
params.quantumCertified: True if key was generated with quantum entropy

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

isQuantumCertified(address).notice: Check if validator has quantum-certified keys

markSignatureUsed(bytes).notice: Mark signature as used (called by QLinkBridge after successful verification)

registerValidatorKey(bytes,uint8,bytes32.notice: Register a validator's PQC public key

verifyPQC(bytes32,bytes,address).notice: Verify PQC signature (looks up validator's registered key)

verifyPQCWithKey(bytes32,bytes,bytes,uin.notice: Verify PQC with explicit key (for cross-chain validation)
